summary: Iteration 60: Comprehensive PMS (Property Management System) testing with agency1@demo.test credentials. All 16 backend API tests passed. All frontend features tested and working: PMS Dashboard, Rooms Management, Check-in/Check-out, Reservation Detail Modal, Tabs Navigation, Hotel Selector, Search functionality.
passed_tests: Backend - test_login_with_agency1_credentials: Login with agency1@demo.test / agency123 works
Backend - test_get_dashboard: GET /api/agency/pms/dashboard returns stats (arrivals, departures, in_house, occupancy_rate, hotels)
Backend - test_dashboard_has_hotels: Dashboard returns hotel list for selector
Backend - test_get_arrivals: GET /api/agency/pms/arrivals returns arrivals list
Backend - test_get_in_house: GET /api/agency/pms/in-house returns in-house guests
Backend - test_get_departures: GET /api/agency/pms/departures returns departures list
Backend - test_get_reservations: GET /api/agency/pms/reservations returns reservations
Backend - test_reservations_search: Reservations search functionality works
Backend - test_list_rooms: GET /api/agency/pms/rooms returns rooms list
Backend - test_create_room: POST /api/agency/pms/rooms creates new room
Backend - test_update_room: PUT /api/agency/pms/rooms/{id} updates room
Backend - test_delete_room: DELETE /api/agency/pms/rooms/{id} deletes room
Backend - test_check_in_reservation: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/check-in works
Backend - test_check_out_reservation: POST /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id}/check-out works
Backend - test_update_reservation_details: PUT /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} updates flight/tour info
Backend - test_get_single_reservation: GET /api/agency/pms/reservations/{id} returns single reservation
Frontend - Login flow: agency1@demo.test successfully logs in and redirects to /app
Frontend - PMS Dashboard page loads at /app/agency/pms
Frontend - Stat cards visible: GIRISLER, OTELDE, CIKISLAR, DOLULUK
Frontend - Tabs navigation: Girisler, Otelde, Cikislar, Tum Rezervasyonlar all clickable
Frontend - Hotel selector dropdown works with 5 hotel options
Frontend - Check-in buttons (Giris) visible and clickable on arrivals
Frontend - Check-out buttons (Cikis) visible and clickable on in-house guests
Frontend - Reservation detail modal opens on row click
Frontend - Edit button (Duzenle) in modal enables edit mode
Frontend - Edit mode shows guest info, flight info, tour info fields
Frontend - Save button (Kaydet) visible in edit mode
Frontend - Search input on Tum Rezervasyonlar tab works
Frontend - PMS Rooms page loads at /app/agency/pms/rooms
Frontend - Rooms grouped by floor: ZEMIN KAT, 1. KAT, 2. KAT, 3. KAT
Frontend - 9 room cards displayed with status badges (Bos, Temizlik)
Frontend - Add Room button (Oda Ekle) opens dialog
Frontend - Add Room dialog has: hotel selector, room number, floor, type, status fields
Frontend - Edit Room (pencil icon) opens edit dialog with pre-populated data
Frontend - Delete Room (trash icon) visible on room cards
Frontend - Sidebar navigation: PMS Paneli and Oda Yonetimi links work
critical_code_review_comments: Good: All PMS API endpoints properly secured with agency role requirements
Good: MongoDB _id excluded from responses via serialization helpers
Good: Check-in/check-out logic handles edge cases (already checked in/out, cancelled)
Good: Room CRUD prevents deletion of occupied rooms
Good: Duplicate room number validation per hotel
Good: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes
Good: PMS Dashboard shows real-time stats with occupancy rate
Good: Rooms page groups rooms by floor for better organization
Good: Reservation detail modal shows comprehensive guest, flight, tour, and price info
Good: Cookie-based auth with X-Client-Platform header working correctly
seed_data_creation: PMS has existing data: 9 rooms (TEST_888, 101-103, 201-203, 301-302) grouped by floor across Demo Hotel 1 and Demo Hotel 2. Multiple reservations with various statuses (Cikis Yapti, Otelde, Beklemede, Iptal). Guests include Ali Yilmaz, Hasan Celik, Mehmet Demir, Ayse Kaya, Fatma Ozturk, Test Misafir, Test Curl Guest.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 60 verified all PMS features: (1) PMS Dashboard at /app/agency/pms - stat cards (GIRISLER, OTELDE, CIKISLAR, DOLULUK), tabs navigation, hotel selector, check-in/check-out buttons, reservation detail modal with edit mode. (2) Room Management at /app/agency/pms/rooms - rooms grouped by floor, CRUD operations (add/edit/delete room), hotel and status filters. All APIs under /api/agency/pms/* working with cookie-based auth. Credentials: agency1@demo.test / agency123. App uses Turkish language.

mocked_apis.notes: All PMS APIs return real data from MongoDB. No mocked endpoints.
